title: Puzzle Forest - Hard Expert
description: The hardest jigsaw puzzle adventure with 8x8 grids. Only for puzzle experts!
author: Freya Stories

pages.text: Welcome to expert mode! 64 tiles to rearrange. Are you ready?
The snowman scene is extra scrambled! Think carefully about each swap.
Mixed difficulty! Start with an easy warm-up.
Now the real challenge! Back to expert difficulty.
Incredible! You're a true puzzle expert! The squirrels are so proud of you!

localizedTitle.ja: パズルの森 - 難関エキスパート
localizedTitle.zh: 拼图森林 - 困难专家

localizedDescription.en: The hardest jigsaw puzzle adventure with 8x8 grids. Only for puzzle experts!
localizedDescription.pl: Najtrudniejsza przygoda z puzzlami 8x8. Tylko dla ekspertów puzzli!
localizedDescription.es: ¡La aventura de rompecabezas más difícil con cuadrículas de 8x8. Solo para expertos!
localizedDescription.de: Das schwierigste Puzzle-Abenteuer mit 8x8-Gittern. Nur für Puzzle-Experten!
localizedDescription.fr: L'aventure puzzle la plus difficile avec des grilles 8x8. Réservé aux experts !
localizedDescription.it: L'avventura puzzle più difficile con griglie 8x8. Solo per esperti di puzzle!
localizedDescription.pt: A aventura de quebra-cabeça mais difícil com grades 8x8. Apenas para especialistas!
localizedDescription.ja: 8x8グリッドの最難関ジグソーパズル冒険。パズルエキスパート専用！
localizedDescription.ar: أصعب مغامرة لغز بشبكات 8×8. فقط لخبراء الألغاز!
localizedDescription.tr: 8x8 ızgaralı en zor yapboz macerası. Sadece yapboz uzmanları için!
localizedDescription.nl: Het moeilijkste puzzelavontuur met 8x8-rasters. Alleen voor puzzelexperts!
localizedDescription.da: Det sværeste puslespilseventyr med 8x8 gitre. Kun for puslespilseksperter!
localizedDescription.la: Aenigma difficillimum cum reticulis 8×8. Solum pro peritis aenigmatum!
localizedDescription.zh: 8x8最难的拼图冒险。只给拼图专家！
